title: chamber of guf
wikitext:
[]: chamber of guf             Quote Post by lilim » Thu Jan 27, 2011 1:34 am i was just reading about this on wiki: chamber of guf and i never really understood what they meant when they referred to the chamber being open at the end of the series, but is it because of the angels being destroyed? if anyone can explain this to me, i'd be really grateful.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Thu Jan 27, 2011 6:36 am IIRC the Chamber of Guf is the Black Moon, a.k.a. the Geofront, which may have been exposed after the explosion of Eva-00.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Jan 27, 2011 5:08 pm Here's one thread (kinda) that I could find on it. I'm sure people will elaborate on this a lot more, but here's the gist of it: The Chamber of Guf was meant to hold the souls of humanity, whether it was during Instrumentality or when Lilith was creating the human race. When Instrumentality occurred, people's souls were released from their bodies (turning them into LCL) and the souls were collected in the Chamber of Guf, as can be illustrated by the two slits (IIRC, the Doors of Guf) opening up in GNR's hands during 3I. The red dots circling the Black Moon are souls to be collected into the Chamber of Guf. Any corrections/second opinions?

[]: Re: chamber of guf             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Thu Jan 27, 2011 8:04 pm Hi, check out Evageeks wiki for some more info on Guf stuff: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Guf lilim wrote: i never really understood what they meant when they referred to the chamber being open at the end of the series, but is it because of the angels being destroyed? if anyone can explain this to me, i'd be really grateful.
